title: Author a filterable, sortable, paginated table with streams
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/invoices_table_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.InvoicesTableLive). Combine filter (?status=), sort (?sort=col&dir=asc), and cursor pagination (?cursor=) via URL params read in handle_params. stream(:invoices, rows, reset: true). Each column header is a <.link patch={~p"/invoices?status=#{@status}&sort=#{col}&dir=#{next_dir}"}>. Pagination links use <.link patch=> as well. mount only sets up empty stream.
tier_rationale: Combines three URL-driven mechanisms. Requires all navigation via patch.
